prompt: Use the skill under test on the fixture repo in `evals/files/linked-doc-fixture/`. Session learnings are in `evals/files/linked-doc-fixture/session_notes.md`. Root `AGENTS.md` already points release details at `docs/release.md`; keep that structure unless the notes justify something else. Treat this as a benchmark run with no live user. Copy the fixture repo to `outputs/repo/`, update the right file, and write `outputs/report.md` with sections `Learnings` and `Applied updates`.
assertions: outputs/repo/docs/release.md includes the new release sanity command.
outputs/repo/AGENTS.md still links release detail to docs/release.md and does not inline the new command.
outputs/report.md includes Learnings and Applied updates.
